about.label: About The Pamper Palace
about.headline: A Luxury Spa Built for Princesses
about.description: Founded in 2023 by Kierra Anderson, The Pamper Palace Luxury Kids Spa is Central Florida's premier pampering destination for girls, tweens, and teens. With brick-and-mortar locations in Ocala and Orlando plus our signature mobile spa bus, we bring the 5-star spa experience to every celebration. Every product we use is non-toxic and gluten-free, because your daughter deserves nothing but the safest and most luxurious treatment.

features.title: Non-Toxic Products Only
features.description: Every product we use is gluten-free and non-toxic — carefully curated for young, sensitive skin.

features.title: Mobile Spa Bus Available
features.description: Our luxury spa bus brings the full pampering experience to your home, school, or event venue.

features.title: Trained Kid-Friendly Staff
features.description: Our team specializes in working with girls, tweens, and teens — patient, kind, and talented.

pricing.headline: Party Packages & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Customizable spa experiences for every occasion — from solo princess visits to full birthday celebrations.

guarantee.headline: Our Royal Promise
guarantee.description: Every girl who visits The Pamper Palace will leave feeling like true royalty. If your daughter's experience doesn't exceed your expectations, we'll make it right — because every princess deserves perfection.

faqs.question: What age group is The Pamper Palace designed for?
faqs.answer: We cater to girls, tweens, and teens — typically ages 4 through 17. Our services and products are specifically chosen to be safe and age-appropriate for young guests.

faqs.question: Are your products safe for children with sensitive skin?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! All of our bath and beauty products are non-toxic and gluten-free. We carefully curate every product to ensure they're gentle and safe for young skin.

faqs.question: How does the mobile spa bus work?
faqs.answer: Our luxury mobile spa bus brings the full Pamper Palace experience to your location — home, school, park, or event venue. We arrive fully equipped with everything needed for a complete spa party.

faqs.question: How far in advance should I book a birthday party?
faqs.answer: We recommend booking at least 2-3 weeks in advance for birthday parties, especially during peak seasons. However, we always try to accommodate last-minute celebrations when possible.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve with the mobile spa bus?
faqs.answer: We serve Ocala, Orlando, Gainesville, and surrounding Central Florida areas. Contact us for availability in your specific location — we love bringing the magic to you!

testimonials.name: Birthday Party Mom
testimonials.text: Mommy this has been the best day ever! Every single detail was perfectly planned out. The experience exceeded all expectations for my daughter's birthday.

testimonials.name: Spa Visit Parent
testimonials.text: This place was amazing! The birthday girl and her friends were pampered and given the full spa treatment that you would expect at a 5 star resort.

testimonials.name: First-Time Visitor
testimonials.text: The facility is GORGEOUS and my daughter left feeling like actual royalty. They even sent cute photos and videos before and after the appointment.

contact.headline: Book Your Princess Experience
contact.subtitle: Whether it's a birthday celebration, girls' day out, or just because — your daughter deserves the royal treatment.
